notes: Keeps noisy review-only DOT Check items out of the main panel for valid work days.
Hides short rest progress cards unless there is a real HOS violation/action.
Pre-trip/inspection review logic now uses the relevant ON DUTY/start-work context before first driving instead of a later pre-trip event.
Delivery route-link metadata review is no longer shown as a main DOT Check issue when route/shipping data is otherwise valid.
Does not change DRIVING event start times, end times, or duty status.
label: v95.78 quiet DOT review items
